project: Create load testing suite using k6 or Vegeta to validate system performance under stress. Define test scenarios simulating: concurrent user logins, parallel job submissions, high-frequency agent heartbeats, document upload bursts, and WebSocket connection scaling. Establish performance baselines and SLOs (e.g., 95th percentile latency < 200ms for API calls, 1000 concurrent users). Add tests/load/ directory with scenarios for each service. Create performance dashboard showing metrics over time. Set up automated performance regression detection in CI.
